vuln_issues.message: fetch_account_balance does not explicitly validate account_id.
fetch_account_balance does not appear to send the token in an Authorization header.
fetch_account_balance does not explicitly validate api_token.
API response JSON is parsed without handling invalid JSON safely.
API response does not appear to validate HTTP status codes or raise for bad responses.
